name: Asphalt / Bitumen
description: Dense graded asphalt wearing course — standard road surface (Austroads Pavement Guide)

name: Concrete
description: Portland cement concrete deck surface — common on older bridges

name: Open Steel Grating
description: Open-bar steel grating — high drainage but affects width restriction for cyclists

name: Timber Decking
description: Hardwood or treated softwood decking — heritage and rural timber bridges

name: Composite Overlay
description: Asphalt over concrete or timber — rehabilitation surface

name: Epoxy / Polymer Overlay
description: Thin bonded polymer overlay — applied to deteriorated concrete decks

name: Bare Structure
description: No wearing surface — bare concrete or steel (inspection item)
